name: on-page-seo
description: On-Page SEO Analyzer - Analyze and optimize your website's SEO performance

scripts.dev:server: cd server && API_PORT=3001 npm run dev
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd .. && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
